name: htmlblock-security-model
hook: HtmlBlock admin sanitization removed — DOMPurify only on student render
body: HtmlBlock (type: 'html') is an admin-only content block. PR #2116 removed HTML sanitization restrictions in the admin editor (HtmlBlockEditor, QuillField) — admins can now use style attributes, details/summary, dir, data-* attributes. The student-facing HtmlBlockRenderer still applies DOMPurify with a strict allowlist (safe formatting tags + limited attributes). Dangerous patterns (event handlers, javascript: URLs) are blocked at admin-input time. Security boundary is: admin trust vs. student untrusted rendering.
why: Future changes to HtmlBlock sanitization should understand the two-tier model (admin verbatim → DOMPurify on render) to avoid introducing vulnerabilities.
